name: Bot UX v2: loader message, always-full preview, save replaces preview
description: Telegram bot companion UX improvements: loader message before AI analysis, always-full preview (remove compact mode), save action edits preview message in-place with one-line success.

planned: Inline plan: 3 UX changes (loader, always-full preview, save-edits-preview). No scope expansion.
done: Loader message: natural input and /ai paths send '⏳ Đang phân tích chi tiêu...' placeholder, then editMessageText after analysis.

Always full preview: renderExpensePreviewText compact parameter removed; expensePreviewCompactKeyboard removed; expensePreviewFullKeyboard renamed to expensePreviewKeyboard; handleDetailExpense removed.
Save replaces preview: handleConfirmExpense accepts messageId, returns mode:'edit' + one-line success text, replyMarkup uses updated expenseCreatedKeyboard (Xem chi tiết / Thêm khoản khác).
TelegramClient.sendMessage returns message_id for loader tracking.
expenseCreatedKeyboard updated: '📋 Xem chi tiết' replaces '🏠 Mở Mini App', callback_data fixed to 'add_expense'.
callback-dispatcher passes messageId to handleConfirmExpense; detail: case removed.

notes: Compact preview fully removed. handleDetailExpense removed. renderConfirmSuccessText removed. callback_data 'add_another_expense' fixed to 'add_expense' to match dispatcher. All error/edge paths in handleConfirmExpense now use mode:'edit' for consistent message hygiene.
